de.uka.ilkd.key.gui

Class DependencyContractCompletion

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.DependencyContractCompletion
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion

    public class DependencyContractCompletion
extends Object
implements InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
    This class completes the instantiation for a dependency contract applications. The user is queried for the heap with which to instantiate the app.

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description

      boolean canComplete(IBuiltInRuleApp app)
      checks if this instance is responsible for the given app

      Checks if the app is supported.
      IBuiltInRuleApp complete(IBuiltInRuleApp app, Goal goal, boolean forced)
      method called to complete the given builtin rule application
      static void extractHeaps(List<LocationVariable> heapContext, List<PosInOccurrence> steps, DependencyContractCompletion.TermStringWrapper[] heaps, LogicPrinter lp) 
      static PosInOccurrence findCorrespondingStep(List<PosInOccurrence> steps, Term[] resultHeaps) 
      private static PosInOccurrence letUserChooseStep(List<LocationVariable> heapContext, List<PosInOccurrence> steps, boolean forced, Services services)
      collects all possible heaps and presents them to the user for selection.

    • Method Detail

      • complete

        public IBuiltInRuleApp complete(IBuiltInRuleApp app,
                       Goal goal,
                       boolean forced)
        Description copied from interface: InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
        method called to complete the given builtin rule application
        Specified by:
        complete in interface InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
        Parameters:
        app - the app to complete
        goal - the goal where the app will be applied
        forced - a boolean indicating if the user shall be bothered if the instantiation is unique or can be chosen in a reasonable way as if unique
        Returns:
        the completed app or null if completion was not possible

      • letUserChooseStep

        private static PosInOccurrence letUserChooseStep(List<LocationVariable> heapContext,
                                List<PosInOccurrence> steps,
                                boolean forced,
                                Services services)
        collects all possible heaps and presents them to the user for selection. If forced is true the user will not be asked if only one alternative is possible
        Parameters:
        steps -
        forced -
        services -
        Returns:

      • findCorrespondingStep

        public static PosInOccurrence findCorrespondingStep(List<PosInOccurrence> steps,
                                    Term[] resultHeaps)

      • extractHeaps

        public static void extractHeaps(List<LocationVariable> heapContext,
                List<PosInOccurrence> steps,
                DependencyContractCompletion.TermStringWrapper[] heaps,
                LogicPrinter lp)

      • canComplete

        public boolean canComplete(IBuiltInRuleApp app)
        Description copied from interface: InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
        checks if this instance is responsible for the given app
        Specified by:
        canComplete in interface InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
        Parameters:
        app - the rule app
        Returns:
        true iff this instance might be able to complete the app

      • checkCanComplete

        public static boolean checkCanComplete(IBuiltInRuleApp app)
        Checks if the app is supported. This functionality is also used by the Eclipse plug-ins like the KeYIDE.
